hero.title: Joshua Hong
hero.metaLine: Freshman | UTSA Men's Golf | NCAA Division I
hero.definition: High-reliability freshman scorer with proven lineup value and Power 4 transfer upside.
hero.supporting: Low-variance profile with strong counting-round reliability, difficult-condition performance, and early evidence of both scoring floor and contention ceiling.

quickSummary: Immediate lineup-value freshman with high counting reliability and low floor risk.
Proven winner with repeat top-3 and top-10 finishes across the season.
Performs well in difficult scoring environments and shows clear score-protection value.
Projects as a realistic 3–5 slot competition profile in a stronger program, with upside beyond baseline stability.

metrics.label: Clippd Adjusted Avg
metrics.note: Strong Division I scoring signal with real lineup value.

metrics.label: Raw Scoring Avg
metrics.note: Freshman-season scoring baseline with stable week-to-week value.

metrics.label: Counting Rate
metrics.note: 26 of 27 counting rounds. Strong travel-roster reliability.

metrics.label: Head-to-Head
metrics.note: Strong field-beating signal beyond rank alone.

metrics.label: Win Rate
metrics.note: Season-long evidence of consistent field advantage.

metrics.label: Top Finishes
metrics.note: Win, podium, and top-10 volume across 9 freshman events.

metrics.label: WAGR
metrics.note: Global ranking reference best read with deeper profile context.

metrics.label: Clippd Rank
metrics.note: Useful market marker; underlying profile appears stronger than rank alone.

playerType.title: Low Variance
playerType.desc: Rarely loses team value through round collapse. Strong floor protection and repeat week-to-week stability.

playerType.title: High Counting Reliability
playerType.desc: A 96.3% counting rate supports real travel-roster stability and a profile coaches can trust in lineup construction.

playerType.title: Difficult-Condition Friendly
playerType.desc: Value tends to hold or improve in tougher scoring conditions. Protects score when fields get stretched.

playerType.title: Ceiling Plus Floor
playerType.desc: More than a stability-only profile. Already shows win equity, podium evidence, and real finishing upside.

timeline.title: Immediate NCAA Lineup Value
timeline.desc: Freshman season translated quickly into win, podium finishes, top-10 volume, and a high-reliability lineup profile.

timeline.title: Back-to-Back Mexico Season Champion
timeline.desc: Six consecutive wins and a second straight Mexico season title reinforced both finishing power and season-long control.

timeline.title: Season Champion Before the Wins
timeline.desc: Early proof of cumulative scoring value. The profile first emerged through consistency, stability, and the ability to separate over time.

points: Only player under par in the field
Tough scoring environment with clear separation pressure
Strong evidence of difficult-condition scoring value
Clear evidence of scoring ceiling and conversion ability
Useful validation beyond weak-field inflation concerns
Supports translation to a higher weekly competition level

underlyingIndicators: 26 of 27 rounds counted toward team score

projectedRole.body: Projects as an immediate lineup-competition player rather than a development-only add. Strong travel-roster value, dependable counting potential, and a realistic path to 3–5 slot competition in a stronger program.
projectedRole.translationText: Reliable counting-round addition with upside beyond baseline stability.
projectedRole.developmentText: Stronger weekly field exposure and higher daily competition may accelerate further ranking movement.

cultureFit: Strong work ethic with consistent post-round practice habits
Comfortable in stronger fields and pressure environments
Steady competitive temperament and coachable profile
Professional conduct, team-oriented behavior, and sportsmanship value
Long-term development mindset over short-term comfort

transferObjective.body: Seeking the next competitive step through stronger daily lineup pressure, more frequent power-field scheduling, and a long-term development environment aligned with professional goals.
transferObjective.noteText: A forward-looking competitive move, not a complaint-based exit.
